CREATE TABLE ldap_entries (dn VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, cn VARCHAR(255), mail VARCHAR(255), sn VARCHAR(255), telephoneNumber VARCHAR(255), objectClass VARCHAR(255));

CREATE PROCEDURE test_ldap_add_boundary_cases (IN first_name VARCHAR, IN last_name VARCHAR) BEGIN DECLARE result INTEGER; DECLARE vec ANY; vec := VECTOR('dn', CONCAT('cn=', first_name, ' ', last_name, ',o=opl,c=BG'), 'cn', VECTOR(CONCAT(first_name, ' ', last_name)), 'mail', VECTOR(CONCAT(first_name, '@example.com')), 'sn', VECTOR(last_name), 'telephoneNumber', VECTOR('032-947020', '032-633710', '048 850 760'), 'objectClass', VECTOR('inetorgperson')); result := ldap_add('ldap://localhost:389', 0, vec, NULL); RETURN (result); END;
